selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
2200
Total Hours
7
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany

Why It's Important
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across teams.
02
Critical Upgrades
Implements crucial technology upgrades including Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure and performant.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces Config Items Management tool for safe packaging and migrating configurations across environments without risk.
Key Epics & Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling across domain boundaries.
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage latest language features, virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for tax operations.
Spring Boot 4.x.x Migration
Upgrade Spring Boot framework to latest version with enhanced observability, improved dependency management, native compilation support, and critical security patches.
Oracle 26ai Database
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered optimization, advanced analytics, and improved query performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
Tech Debt Across Teams
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction initiatives spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
Config Items Management
Build dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production environments without manual intervention.

agenticCustomInput:
I expect 1 instances.
Generate only slides for each  "initiative" found under the "initiative group" called "REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATIONS" in "Estimates.xlsx". 
"Total hours" value for the "initiative" can be found in the "Estimates.xlsx" where the value is in the "Initiative Total Hours" column.

Dont halucinate numbers. If you cannot find or calculate them, Write [NO DATA].
agenticJsonResponse:
{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
VAT
Reference Implementations · Solon Tax 2026
461
Total Hours
2
Roadmap Features
GTM
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Tax Account Reference Implementation
Enable revenue officers to efficiently manage VAT debts and payments through reconciliation periods, providing a comprehensive demonstration of Solon Tax's capability to support VAT Tax Account requirements.
02
Compliance Warning System
Reduce taxpayer compliance errors by providing clear field labeling and proactive warnings about VIES Statement obligations, showcasing Solon Tax capability for intelligent warnings.
03
Demo-Ready Configuration
Establish vital documentation and configuration guide for introducing VAT Tax Account reference implementation, essential for demos and future implementation needs.
Key Epics & Features
VAT Tax Account Reference Implementation
Create necessary configuration for Tax Account reference implementation including Revenue Type configuration with taxAccount and reconciliationPeriod flags, reconciliation period management, financial transaction linking, and specialized Tax Account UI with balance display and period timeline.
Balance Management
Support opening balance recording, automatic closing balance calculation based on transactions and adjustments, balance transfer between periods, and manual adjustments with proper validation and audit trail.
Debt and Payment Processing
Enable debt recording for VAT liabilities, payment processing and allocation to specific periods, cross-period allocation support, and interest and penalty calculation for overdue amounts.
VAT Return Form - Intracommunity Transaction Warning
Enhance VAT Return Form with field label corrections for intracommunity transaction fields and implement warning mechanism displaying VIES Statement submission obligations when intracommunity fields contain non-zero values.
Field Label Updates
Rename intracommunity transaction field labels in VAT Return Form to accurately reflect their purpose: Intracommunity Sales, Intracommunity Sales without VAT, Intracommunity Purchases, and Intracommunity Purchases without VAT.
Warning Implementation & Persistence
Display warning message when intracommunity fields contain values, allowing form submission to proceed while warning persists throughout editing session and disappears when fields are cleared.
"}]}}}
